title: astraea subcomosa
intro: Astraea subcomosa, also known as the Sub-comosa Starflower, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Astraea subcomosa include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. Astraea subcomosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
